hypre: review Probe hypre through artifact://environment-spec/eng_petsc_family_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for hypre. Checklist hypre pack links to the intended environment spec(s), hypre adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, hypre anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path. Watch anti-patterns Using hypre for using hypre as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside solver-backend workflows., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_petsc_family_docker., Crossing the adapter boundary for hypre without a typed contract tied to hypre backend kernels reused by solver-backend workflows..
